overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along railroad tracks at night through a rural prairie landscape. The character eventually steps off the tracks onto a dirt path, continuing through grasslands with rocky hills and a distant wooden house visible under a cloudy, moonlit sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railroad tracks through open grassland at night

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks running straight through the landscape
gravel and crushed stone bed surrounding the railroad tracks
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires running alongside the tracks
large rocky hill formations with layered stone visible in the distance
tall prairie grass and vegetation on both sides of the tracks
small wooden house with a pitched roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along railroad tracks through an open prairie landscape at night. The scene is illuminated by moonlight filtering through scattered clouds, with rocky hills visible in the distance and a wooden house on the left horizon. Telegraph poles line the tracks, and tall grass grows on both sides of the gravel bed.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through grassland with rocky outcrops

events.description: character steps off the railroad tracks onto a dirt path through the grass
camera tilts upward to look at the telegraph pole and starry sky while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt trail while occasionally looking around at the landscape and sky

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through the grass alongside the former tracks
prominent rocky outcrop and boulders on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having left the railroad tracks, the character now walks along a dirt trail through open grassland. The camera briefly tilts up to observe a telegraph pole against the starry night sky around the 42-second mark. The wooden house remains visible on the left, now closer, while large rock formations appear on the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a linear journey along railroad tracks to a trek through open, rocky grasslands under a moonlit sky. It begins with the character walking along a gravel railroad bed lined with telegraph poles, while a wooden house and distant rocky hills are visible beneath scattered clouds. As the character steps off the tracks, the scene shifts to a dirt trail cutting through tall grass, bringing the distant house and large rock formations into closer view. The camera briefly tilts upward to capture a telegraph pole silhouetted against the starry night sky before returning to the path. Finally, the movement continues forward through the open prairie, deepening the immersion in the rural nocturnal landscape.
